languages.text: {n}Из-за горизонта с низким гулом выныривает звено "Валькирий", хищно несущихся к дворцу. Одновременно с их появлением раздается надрывный вой сигнала воздушной тревоги. Спустя несколько секунд вы слышите свист бомб, огненным дождем низвергающихся с небес.{/n}

{n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Из-за горизонта с низким гулом выныривает звено "Валькирий", хищно несущихся к дворцу. Одновременно с их появлением раздается надрывный вой сигнала воздушной тревоги. Спустя несколько секунд вы слышите свист бомб, огненным дождем низвергающихся с небес.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

{n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

{n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伴随着低沉的轰鸣，一队瓦尔基里机群掠过地平线，如猛禽般朝宫殿疾扑而来，空袭警报应声大作。短短数秒后，你便听到炸弹的尖啸撕裂空气，烈焰从天空倾泻而下。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着低沉的轰鸣，一队瓦尔基里机群掠过地平线，如猛禽般朝宫殿疾扑而来，空袭警报应声大作。短短数秒后，你便听到炸弹的尖啸撕裂空气，烈焰从天空倾泻而下。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un grondement sourd accompagne l'escadron de Valkyries qui se profile à l'horizon. Il fonce droit sur le palais comme une nuée de rapaces et déclenche rapidement la sirène d'alerte antiaérienne. Quelques secondes plus tard, vous entendez le sifflement de bombes qui se mettent à pleuvoir sur la zone.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un grondement sourd accompagne l'escadron de Valkyries qui se profile à l'horizon. Il fonce droit sur le palais comme une nuée de rapaces et déclenche rapidement la sirène d'alerte antiaérienne. Quelques secondes plus tard, vous entendez le sifflement de bombes qui se mettent à pleuvoir sur la zone.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alçak bir kükreme eşliğinde ufukta bir Valkür filosu beliriyor, yırtıcı kuşlar gibi saraya doğru atılıyorlar. Hava saldırısı sireni, belirmeleriyle aynı anda çalmaya başlıyor. Saniyeler sonra gökyüzünden ateş yağarken bombaların ıslığını duyuyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alçak bir kükreme eşliğinde ufukta bir Valkür filosu beliriyor, yırtıcı kuşlar gibi saraya doğru atılıyorlar. Hava saldırısı sireni, belirmeleriyle aynı anda çalmaya başlıyor. Saniyeler sonra gökyüzünden ateş yağarken bombaların ıslığını duyuyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Con un rugido grave, un escuadrón de Valkyries surge del horizonte, volando hacia el palacio como aves de presa. La sirena de bombardeo aéreo resuena al tiempo de su aparición. En segundos, oyes el silbido de los proyectiles mientras ves caer una lluvia de fuego desde el cielo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Con un rugido grave, un escuadrón de Valkyries surge del horizonte, volando hacia el palacio como aves de presa. La sirena de bombardeo aéreo resuena al tiempo de su aparición. En segundos, oyes el silbido de los proyectiles mientras ves caer una lluvia de fuego desde el cielo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit einem dumpfen Dröhnen erscheint ein Geschwader Walküren am Horizont, die sich wie Raubvögel auf den Palast stürzen. Ihr Ankunft wird von den Sirenen des Fliegeralarms begleitet. Wenige Sekunden später hörst du das Pfeifen von Bomben, als Feuer vom Himmel regnet.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem dumpfen Dröhnen erscheint ein Geschwader Walküren am Horizont, die sich wie Raubvögel auf den Palast stürzen. Ihr Ankunft wird von den Sirenen des Fliegeralarms begleitet. Wenige Sekunden später hörst du das Pfeifen von Bomben, als Feuer vom Himmel regnet.{/n}

languages.text: {n}轟轟と轟きながら、ヴァルキリーの一翼が地平線から現れ、猛禽類のように宮殿に向かって急降下する。その出現と同時に、空襲警報のサイレンが鳴り響く。数秒後、爆弾の爆風と、空から降る炎が聞こえる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a low roar, a wing of Valkyries emerges from over the horizon, hurtling toward the palace like raptors. The air raid siren sounds in time with their appearance. Within seconds, you hear the whistling of bombs as fire rains down from the sky.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}轟轟と轟きながら、ヴァルキリーの一翼が地平線から現れ、猛禽類のように宮殿に向かって急降下する。その出現と同時に、空襲警報のサイレンが鳴り響く。数秒後、爆弾の爆風と、空から降る炎が聞こえる。{/n}
